evals.prompt: Please update AGENTS.md based on what we learned today. We discovered that rg is faster than grep in this repo, that we should use apply_patch for single-file edits, and that we should run get_errors after edits. Show me proposed additions first; do not apply yet.
evals.expected_output: Proposes concise, file-targeted AGENTS.md updates and asks for approval before editing.
expectations: Includes a proposed diff block rather than immediately applying edits
Contains an explicit approval question before any file change
Captures at least two durable, actionable learnings from the prompt

evals.prompt: Wrap up this session by capturing durable guidance in AGENTS.md. Important: this repo currently has no AGENTS.md file yet, so handle that case cleanly and keep it brief.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes missing AGENTS.md and proposes creating a root file with concise, high-signal entries pending approval.
expectations: Explicitly states that no AGENTS.md files were found
Proposes creating ./AGENTS.md instead of failing silently
Requests approval before creating the file

evals.prompt: Do a retrospective AGENTS update, but only include recurring rules. Ignore one-off incidents. Present findings and grouped proposed updates by file path.
evals.expected_output: Returns a structured, concise response with findings and grouped proposed updates, filtering out noisy one-off items.
expectations: Proposed updates are grouped by AGENTS.md file path
